@everyone

Escape Velocity Stats

In just 12 hours Escape Velocity has had:

• 250,000+ movement transactions  
• 2,300+ wallets connected  
• 304,000+ ships scanned  
• 50,000+ loot found  

We launched Escape Velocity last night and the feedback has already been phenomenal. Thank you for your continued passion for Star Atlas.
